name: Maple-Mustard-Glazed Pork Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the maple syrup, Dijon-style mustard, cider vinegar, soy sauce, salt, and pepper until well combined.
2. Spread the mixture evenly over the pork roast.
3. Place the pork roast in a shallow pan.
4. Roast the pork in a 350-degree oven until an internal temperature of 160 degrees is reached, about 45 minutes to 1 1/4 hours.
5. Remove the pork from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing to serve.
Serves 6
